name: scientific-agent-skills
description: A Codex plugin packaging K-Dense Scientific Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance, and writing.

interface.shortDescription: Research and scientific workflow skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Scientific Agent Skills packages the K-Dense open-source skill collection for Codex Desktop, covering literature review, scientific writing, bioinformatics, cheminformatics, clinical research, data analysis, visualization, machine learning, laboratory automation, and scientific databases.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me with a scientific research task using the relevant Scientific Agent Skills.
